title: recall query spec
description: Optional spec file for `hpc-mapreduce recall`. The same arguments are exposed as CLI flags (--root, --task-kind, --operator, --since, --limit) and the operator picks one path. The flag form is more convenient for shell pipelines; the spec form is more convenient when the calling agent already has a structured filter to pass.

root.description: Filesystem directory to walk (recursively) for interview.json files.

since.description: Only return campaigns with _materialized.at >= this ISO-8601 timestamp.

limit.description: Cap on results returned. The total match count (pre-truncation) is reported via data.total_matching.
